untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'estimated fundamental value' which is not available in the indicator set. No direct fundamental value estimator exists in allowed indicators. Price deviation measurement (2.0%) and liquidity demand confirmation cannot be precisely operationalized without custom fundamental value calculation or order flow microstructure data. Used sma_50 as proxy for fundamental value and vol_ratio_20 as proxy for liquidity demand, but this is an approximation.
translation_notes: CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction interpreted as LONG when price below SMA50 (undervalued) and SHORT when above SMA50 (overvalued). Vol_ratio_20 used as uninformed liquidity activity proxy. SMA_50 substituted for unobservable fundamental value estimate. Confirmation bar logic embedded in entry conditions. Exit on mean reversion (price crossing SMA_50) or max 5-bar hold.
